Our Services

Comfortable homes, year-round.

From quick repairs to full system replacements — plus ductwork and basement projects. Diamond handles every part of your home's comfort.

Heating Service

Furnace installs, repairs, and seasonal tune-ups on gas, electric, and high-efficiency systems. We keep your home warm through every winter.

Request service →

Air Conditioning

From quick fixes to full AC replacements. We service every major brand and won't sell you anything you don't actually need.

Request service →

Tune-Ups & Maintenance

Preventive maintenance plans that catch the little stuff before it becomes the expensive stuff. Schedule us each spring and fall — that's it.

Request service →

Ductwork & Basement Finishing

New duct runs, repairs, and full installs for finished basements, additions, and remodels. Properly sized and sealed so every room gets the airflow it needs.

Request service →

About Diamond

Built on trust. Run by family.

Diamond Heating and Cooling was founded by Kevin Williams in 2018 with a simple idea: treat folks the way you'd want your own family treated. No upselling. No surprise fees. Just good, honest HVAC work at a fair price.

Today, the company is owned and operated by Colton Williams, who's carried that same philosophy forward across the greater Kansas City metro. We've earned the trust of hundreds of homeowners — many of whom feel more like friends than customers.

When you call Diamond, you get a real person who knows your name, knows your system, and shows up when they said they would.

CW
Colton Williams
Owner & Operator
Our Promise

The Diamond Standard

Four things we promise on every job. It's not a marketing slogan — it's how we've operated every single day since 2018.

Fair Pricing

Honest quotes from the start. No hidden fees, no surprise add-ons, no pressure.

On Time

We show up when we say we will. Your time matters as much as ours.

Clean Work

Shoe covers, drop cloths, and a tidy job site. We leave it better than we found it.

Real People

Talk to an actual person — not a call center. We know our customers by name.
